instruction:
Including 8\% sales tax, an inn charges \$216.00 per night. Find the nightly cost at the inn before tax is added. a) Write an equation to model the problem. Let x represent the nightly cost before tax. Answer: [ANS]
b) Solve the equation to find nightly cost before tax. (Note: Your answer should be in the form \$ddd.cc. \$ddd.cc.) Answer: [ANS]
